name: ai-visibility
description: Track brand visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini. Check mention rates, sentiment, positions, and get improvement recommendations.
author: sharozdawa

tools.name: check_brand_visibility
tools.description: Check a brand's visibility across AI platforms with per-platform mention rates, positions, sentiment, and competitor analysis.

tools.name: check_single_query
tools.description: Check if a brand is mentioned for a specific query on a specific AI platform.

tools.name: get_visibility_score
tools.description: Calculate overall AI visibility score (0-100) with tier rating and recommendations.

tools.name: compare_brands
tools.description: Compare AI visibility of multiple brands side by side with rankings.

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Get prioritized recommendations to improve a brand's AI visibility.

tools.name: list_platforms
tools.description: List all supported AI platforms with details on how each sources information.
